subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1915-06-24
subcodes.first_line: It encompasseth them both, even as the Children of Israel, the Children of Hashim, the Children of Umayyah, the Children of Japheth, the Children of Shem, and the Children of Abbas - this is the designation of the East [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شامل هر دو است مثل بنی اسرائیل  و بنی حشام  و بنی امیه  و بنی یافث   و بنی سام   و بنی عباس ،  این اصطلاح شرق است
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @prophecy and fulfillment, @stories; anecdotes
